nativeProps: React input attributes except owned type, value, defaultValue, and change fields

compositionPolicy.native: The browser owns locale editing, validation, mobile picker, autofill, and form serialization.
compositionPolicy.context: Optional localized date context is associated through aria-describedby and is absent when disabled or empty.
compositionPolicy.reset: Uncontrolled values restore the initial default; controlled owners receive one default-value request after an uncancelled reset.
